task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/propeller_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Create a new Propeller geometry component in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is open with a Propeller component visible in the 3D workspace and listed in the Geom Browser.

task_completion.description: Rename the propeller component to match the specified model name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Geom Browser or component properties window shows the propeller component named exactly 'HC-B4TN'.

task_completion.description: Set the number of blades, diameter, and precone angle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP parameter window for the propeller shows Number of Blades set to 4, Diameter set to 2.36, and Precone set to 2.5.

task_completion.description: Ensure the blade has at least 3 radial cross-sections defined
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Section/XSec tab in the propeller's geometry window shows a list of at least 3 cross-sections, or the 3D model clearly displays at least 3 distinct radial control sections.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/kingair_propeller.vsp3, or the OpenVSP window title bar displaying 'kingair_propeller.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to create and modify the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP graphical interface being manipulated, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the geometry.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors open showing raw XML/VSP3 file contents being manually typed or pasted.

integrity.description: The file was saved through the OpenVSP application
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is performed via the OpenVSP File menu or Save dialog, not by using terminal commands like 'cp' or 'echo' to spoof the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected propeller model name is 'HC-B4TN'. The propeller must have 4.0 blades, a diameter of 2.36 meters, and a precone angle of 2.5 degrees. The blade must have a minimum of 3 cross-sections. The final file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/kingair_propeller.vsp3'.
